denovo_summary.indications_for_use:
The BrainSee is indicated as follows: 
"BrainSee is a software application indicated as a prognostic tool to aid in the clinical 
assessment of how likely patients aged between 55 and 95 years old who are diagnosed 
with amnestic mild cognitive impairment (aMCI) are to progress to clinical Alzheimer's 
disease (AD)-dementia within 5 years of assessment. BrainSee analyzes inputs of brain 
magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), patient demographic information, and cognitive 
assessment scores to produce a similarity score between 0 and 100 reflecting the degree
denovo_summary.clinical_study_summary: Clinical performance testing Postmarket surveillance Software verification, validation, and hazard analysis Labeling LABELING The labeling is sufficient and satisfies the requirements of 21 CFR 801.109 for prescription devices. The labeling includes a detailed description of the device. The labeling also describes the patient population for whom the device should be used, details the requirements for device inputs, and discusses how to interpret the device outputs.
